_note: Short visa/travel-authorisation note for British citizens, tourist stays. Always defers to gov.uk for detail. Keep accurate; re-check with the monthly gov.uk routine.
usa: You need an ESTA (visa waiver) approved before you travel.
canada: You need an eTA before you fly.
australia: You need an ETA or eVisitor before you travel.
india: You need an e-Visa arranged before you travel.
china: You need a visa before you travel (some transit exemptions apply).
vietnam: You need an e-visa before you travel.
sri-lanka: You need an ETA before you travel.
indonesia: You need a visa on arrival or e-VOA.
egypt: You need a visa (e-visa or visa on arrival).
turkey: No visa needed for tourist stays up to 90 days.
thailand: No visa needed for tourist stays (check the current day limit on gov.uk).
morocco: No visa needed for stays up to 90 days.
mexico: No visa needed for tourism, but you must complete the entry form.
